title: Harden remote live-sync, CAS retry, and shared-ref reconciliation under real concurrency
summary: Close the operational gaps in the shared-ref authority plane by finishing robust fetch-verify-push retry semantics, remote live-sync import behavior, concurrent writer reconciliation, and recovery when shared coordination publication loses a race or observes a moved head.

acceptance.label: Shared coordination publication survives realistic concurrent writers through retry and reconciliation rather than manual repair.
Remote head movement and live-sync events converge runtime state without stale or duplicated coordination outcomes.
